_note: docs/46 Phase 3 (2026-07-12): ledger import-boundary ratchet. Files outside modules/ledger that reference the journalEntries/journalLines Drizzle tables are grandfathered here; the set may only SHRINK. New GL reads go through LedgerReadService (accountNet/cashPosition/entryRefNo) — or add an equally narrow method there — and postings via LedgerService.postEntry. Some grandfathered reads are by design and expected to stay (finance reconcileControls REC-04 reads both sides of the reconciliation independently; consolidation's group eliminations); the rest are Phase 3+ migration candidates. Drop a file here in the same PR that removes its direct reads (--update regenerates).
